items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.lead_paragraph: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.lead_paragraph: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

Golden Gate Claude
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: When we turn up the strength of the “Golden Gate Bridge” feature, Claude’s responses begin to focus on the Golden Gate Bridge. For a short time, we’re making this model available for everyone to interact with.

items.title: Government of Alberta uses Claude to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities

items.lead_paragraph: The Government of Alberta has been using Claude Code with both Opus and Sonnet models to review its systems, find vulnerabilities, and fix them.

items.title: Announcing Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy

items.lead_paragraph: We’re publishing our Responsible Scaling Policy—a series of technical and organizational protocols that we’re adopting to help us manage the risks of developing increasingly capable AI systems.
